linting.notes: golangci-lint v2.1.6 configured with custom linters: copyloopvar, dupword, importas, predeclared, tagalign, unconvert, unused. Also runs goimports formatter.

testing.test_directory: test/e2e/ (e2e tests), *_test.go files throughout codebase (unit tests)
env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - set automatically by make unit-test
testing.mock_patterns: Uses Ginkgo's BeforeEach/AfterEach for test setup/teardown
testing.coverage_command: go test ./... -coverprofile cover.out && go tool cover -html=cover.out -o cover.html
testing.notes: Unit tests use controller-runtime's envtest for mocking Kubernetes API. E2E tests require Kind cluster with operator deployed. Unit tests exclude e2e package via: go list ./... | grep -v /e2e

gating_checks.name: code-check
gating_checks.command: go mod tidy && make generate && make verify-codegen && make go-fmt && make go-vet && make go-lint

gating_checks.name: build-helm-chart
gating_checks.command: make manifests && make detect-crds-drift && make helm-unittest && ct lint && make helm-docs

gating_checks.name: e2e-test
gating_checks.command: make kind-create-cluster && make kind-load-image && make e2e-test

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request and push to main/master/release-* branches. E2E tests run on matrix of Kubernetes versions 1.24-1.32. Helm chart tests only run if chart files changed. OpenShift e2e tests only trigger on specific path changes.

build.notes: Uses controller-gen for generating CRDs/RBAC manifests, setup-envtest for test infrastructure. Binary output: bin/spark-operator. Container build via Dockerfile using golang:1.24.10 builder.

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions for standard tests, Ginkgo Describe/It blocks for e2e
conventions.import_style: Grouped imports with aliases enforced by golangci-lint importas: k8s.io/api/core/v1 -> corev1, k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1 -> metav1, sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime -> ctrl
conventions.notes: Follows Kubernetes operator conventions. Uses controller-runtime and kubebuilder patterns. Suite test files (suite_test.go) set up Ginkgo test suites.

test_commands.notes: Passed - All unit tests passed, coverage report generated

container_recipe.notes: All validation passed without external dependencies. E2E tests (make e2e-test) require Kind cluster and are not validated in this basic container. System deps (make, git) are pre-installed in golang:1.24.10 image.

validation.summary: install OK, build OK, lint OK (go-fmt, go-vet, golangci-lint all 0 issues), tests OK (all unit tests passed)

Helm chart tests require Helm and chart-testing tools
Some CI checks require code generation verification (make generate, make verify-codegen) which may modify files
OpenShift-specific e2e tests require OpenShift cluster and are only triggered on specific path changes
